vocab.example: I am eager to pursue an interdisciplinary study that bridges the gap between environmental science and urban planning.
If I had the chance, I would focus on the ethical implications of rapid technological advancement in artificial intelligence.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi trí tuệ/học thuật
vocab.example: Studying ancient philosophy is more of an intellectual pursuit for me than a career-oriented choice.

vocab.meaning: có được cái nhìn sâu sắc về điều gì
vocab.example: I would love to gain insights into how global financial markets react to political instability.
Being part of a pioneering research team in regenerative medicine would be a dream come true for me.
I believe that mastering data analytics would be a significant milestone in my professional development.

vocab.meaning: các kỹ thuật tiên tiến nhất
vocab.example: I am particularly interested in learning cutting-edge techniques in sustainable architecture to combat climate change.
A formal course would help me build a solid theoretical foundation in linguistics, which I currently lack.

vocab.meaning: bảo tồn di sản văn hóa
vocab.example: If the opportunity arose, I would study digital archiving to aid in cultural heritage preservation.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng bộ kỹ năng của bản thân
vocab.example: Taking up a course in public speaking would certainly help broaden my skill set and boost my confidence.
